title: Tether Has Blocked $3.5 Billion in Crime-Linked Stablecoins Since 2023
snippet: Tether has frozen $3.5 billion of its stablecoins since 2023 and a total of $4.2 billion since the company’s launch, in cases where the tokens were linked to illicit activity, a company spokesperson told Reuters in a report published Friday (Feb. 27).
